attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE21, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE22, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE23, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE24, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE25, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE26, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE27, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE28, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE29, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE30, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.BLD_BLK_INFO_TYPE_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.CONSOLIDATED_FLAG, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.DATA_SET_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.TIME_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES,
(
select TIME_ATTRIBUTE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES
minus
select TIME_ATTRIBUTE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES
) ACM
where 
 ACM.TIME_ATTRIBUTE_ID = STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.TIME_ATTRIBUTE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_HXC_TIME_ATTRIBUTES)
